explanations.3: The HTML comment with 'highlight-next-line' tells the documentation renderer to visually emphasize line 6 when displaying this file.
explanations.5: This is another highlight directive—it marks line 6 for special visual treatment in the rendered documentation.
explanations.17: This syntax is a Hugo template tag that includes another file's content (like inserting a reusable snippet) at this location in the final output.
